---
name: mui-docs
description: Use this to reference MUI (Material UI) documentation when implementing UI components.
applyTo: "**/*.{tsx,jsx,ts,js}"
---

# Material UI Documentation Reference

When implementing UI with MUI components, reference the official documentation:

## Core Components

- [App Bar](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-app-bar/)
- [Autocomplete](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-autocomplete/)
- [Avatar](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-avatar/)
- [Badge](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-badge/)
- [Box](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-box/)
- [Breadcrumbs](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-breadcrumbs/)
- [Button](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-button/)
- [Button Group](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-button-group/)
- [Card](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-card/)
- [Checkbox](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-checkbox/)
- [Chip](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-chip/)
- [Container](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-container/)
- [Dialog](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-dialog/)
- [Divider](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-divider/)
- [Drawer](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-drawer/)
- [Grid](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-grid/)
- [Icon](https://mui.com/material-ui/icons/)
- [Link](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-link/)
- [List](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-list/)
- [Menu](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-menu/)
- [Modal](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-modal/)
- [Pagination](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-pagination/)
- [Paper](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-paper/)
- [Progress](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-progress/)
- [Radio Button](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-radio-button/)
- [Rating](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-rating/)
- [Select](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-select/)
- [Slider](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-slider/)
- [Snackbar](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-snackbar/)
- [Stack](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-stack/)
- [Stepper](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-stepper/)
- [Switch](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-switch/)
- [Table](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-table/)
- [Tabs](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-tabs/)
- [Text Field](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-text-field/)
- [Tooltip](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-tooltip/)
- [Typography](https://mui.com/material-ui/react-typography/)

## Customization

- [Theming](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/theming/)
- [Palette](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/palette/)
- [Typography](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/typography/)
- [Spacing](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/spacing/)
- [Breakpoints](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/breakpoints/)
- [Dark Mode](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/dark-mode/)
- [How to Customize](https://mui.com/material-ui/customization/how-to-customize/)

## Design Resources

- [Material UI for Figma](https://mui.com/material-ui/design-resources/material-ui-for-figma/)
- [Material UI Sync Plugin](https://mui.com/material-ui/design-resources/material-ui-sync/)

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://mui.com/material-ui/getting-started/installation/)
- [Usage](https://mui.com/material-ui/getting-started/usage/)
